creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
I am getting this error:
> Installing py27-backports.shutil_get_terminal_size-1.0.0...
> pkg-static: py27-backports.shutil_get_terminal_size-1.0.0 conflicts with py27-backports.weakref-1.0.r1 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/backports/__init__.py

devel/ipython depends on backports.shutil_get_terminal_size, and py27-tensorflow from bug#219609 depends on py27-backports.weakref-1.0.r1
